phase_name: Session 31 — 4,212 lines of Lean 4 formalizing the RH proof landscape
summary: Session 31 expanded to Lean 4 formalization. 10 files, 4,212 lines. Full proof framework: Selberg class axioms with counterexamples (Epstein/Davenport-Heilbronn), Hadamard product + explicit formula + N(T), GUE universality (sine kernel, Montgomery, Wigner, Tracy-Widom), and the master ProofAtlas linking everything. The ProofAtlas identifies 4 minimum viable proof paths, each reducing to one irreducible sorry equivalent to RH. Lean toolchain rebuilt (v4.29.0-rc6), lake update running for Mathlib download. TaoNetwork survey maps the external ecosystem (PNT+, IEANT, ANTEDB) and identifies our unique contribution: structural analysis of the critical phenomenon.

files: HadamardExplicit.lean (727) — Hadamard product, explicit formula, N(T)
GUEUniversality.lean (660) — RMT, sine kernel, pair correlation
ProofAtlas.lean (780) — Master proof chain, dependency graph

proof_paths: 1. Connes: Q_W positivity -> Weil positivity -> RH
3. Explicit formula: contour integration -> explicit formula -> zero-free -> RH
4. Selberg class: structural constraint -> GRH -> RH
key_insights_from_lean: Category 3 (structural) is the only viable approach — formalized in SelbergClass.lean
Contour integration is THE missing infrastructure piece — blocks Hadamard, explicit formula, AND N(T)
The pipeline GAP between explicit bounds and RH is formally unbridgeable by quantitative methods
Our work is COMPLEMENTARY to Tao's IEANT/PNT+ pipeline, not competing
